text: Hey there, tech enthusiasts! If you’ve been keeping an eye on the AI landscape, you know that ChatGPT is revolutionizing how we interact with technology. . Now, the way we develop apps is changing drastically—it's no longer just about code and design. . In fact, Alpic has shared some incredible lessons from their journey in building ChatGPT Apps that you won’t want to miss! .

Let’s dive right into the core of these lessons! First up is the idea of AI-first experiences. . Unlike traditional applications which focus heavily on UI workflows, ChatGPT Apps prioritize interaction with AI models. . This shift means developers need to rethink how they structure their applications. .

One of the biggest challenges developers face is managing the flow of information between the user, UI, and the model. . Traditional web patterns like just-in-time data fetching can actually hurt the user experience in these apps. . It’s crucial to design around the AI’s capabilities rather than against them. .

So, how can you get started? Alpic has created an open-source framework called Skybridge that incorporates all these lessons into a user-friendly format. . This is a game-changer for developers looking to build efficient ChatGPT Apps. . Additionally, a Codex Skill has been developed to streamline the process of ideation, building, testing, and shipping your app. .

In conclusion, building ChatGPT Apps is a different beast compared to traditional development. . It requires a fresh perspective on app structure and user interaction. . If you’re ready to embrace this AI-first approach, these lessons from Alpic will pave the way for your success! . Thanks for watching, and don’t forget to like and subscribe for more tech insights!
